title: justicia flavescens
intro: Justicia flavescens, also known as Goldenvine, is a plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. Goldenvine can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in herbal infusions, such as infusions with other medicinal plants like ginger and peppermint.
